title: 惊魂醉阳楼
synopsis: 民国三年，天津醉阳楼。一场精心策划的谋杀正在上演，九名嫌疑人各有动机。在这座隐藏着家族秘密的酒楼里，真凶就藏在幸存者之中。
styleGuide: 1914 Republican era Chinese restaurant in Tianjin, traditional architecture, oil painting style, dramatic lighting, mysterious atmosphere

cover.prompt: Vertical poster for a 1914 Chinese restaurant murder mystery. Traditional Tianjin architecture, oil painting style, dramatic lighting, nine silhouettes in period costumes, mysterious atmosphere
